name: Ruby and Yang: Wind's Reunion
description:
After arriving in Vacuo, Ruby and Yang discover the truth: They had another sibling, one they never knew existed. Before the final battle, they set out to find them, bringing the family all together before the worst could come to pass.

https://www.reddit.com/r/RWBY/comments/pazq00/sisters_art_by_irusuva_on_twitter/
creator: Jack4884
